reasoning_content:
Now I need to implement the location tracking and StartOfLine/LeadingSpace detection. Let me look at the current implementation and update it to properly track these.

The key things I need to do:
1. Track the current file name from line markers (# linenum filename flags)
2. Track line and column numbers
3. Detect StartOfLine (token at the beginning of a line)
4. Detect LeadingSpace (token has whitespace before it)

Let me update the main.cpp file to implement this.
